title: Kat's Pure FPS
description: modpack purely for performance without other mods that dont bring in any.
body:
a mod pack purely made for fps.
focusing on better performance and memory usage.

testing the fps ![200 fps on an old ass pc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4460d142926e5500d08c711e163b37dff7f59c7.png)

i5 b200u btw this thing cant even run roblox at 120
